name: Deidre Hall's Strawberry Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 package Cream cheese; softened (3 oz ea)
3 1/2 tbsp Fresh lemon juice (from 1 small lemon)
1 9-inch baked pie shell at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash strawberries carefully and let them dry.
2. Remove stems from strawberries, selecting larger ones to place on top of the pie. Reserve smaller strawberries for use in the filling.
3. Beat together cream cheese, sugar, and lemon juice until smooth and fluffy. Fold in whipped cream and chopped strawberries.
4. Spoon the filling lightly into the baked pie shell.
5. Place the larger strawberries, cut side down, on top of the filling.
6. Spread the currant or strawberry jelly over the top, ensuring it reaches a consistency similar to thickened gelatin.
7. Cover and refrigerate for several hours, or freeze overnight before serving. Allow about 1 hour to thaw slightly before cutting.
8. Serve with additional whipped cream if desired. This recipe is also delicious made with fresh raspberries, blueberries, or black pitted cherries. Serves 8.
